summary: 2 PRs merged (#1504, #1507). P0 blockers persist (toolchain break #1467, worker pool #1402, zombie vitest #1452, Codex budget #1431). agentguard-cloud at 2.10.1 (should be 2.10.3) — 9th cycle of version drift. Sprint plan #1508 filed by planning agent. CI green (5/5). #1473 dogfood observed this cycle (EM state write blocked by no-governance-self-modification invariant).
